description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a modern, urban design with a combination of light gray, white, and dark gray tones. The upper is constructed from a mix of mesh-like textile and synthetic leather, providing both breathability and structure. A bold, black swoosh-like accent is present on the side, adding a dynamic visual element. The midsole is thick and sculpted, with pronounced geometric shapes and a dark gray color, suggesting enhanced cushioning and support. The shoe is equipped with standard criss-cross lacing and a padded collar for comfort. The overall appearance is clean and unworn, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A modern high-top sneaker with a mix of mesh and synthetic leather in gray and white, featuring a bold black side accent and a thick, sculpted sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black swoosh-like accent, mesh-textile upper, and sculpted dark gray sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing, rounded toe, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the black accent visible, showing the layered construction and midsole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel support, and the continuation of the mesh-textile material.
